name: Electrical Balloon Callouts
query:
SELECT
    bi.parent AS "BOM:Link/BOM:220",
    bi.custom_balloon_numbers AS "Balloon #:Data:90",
    bi.item_code AS "Component:Link/Item:140",
    bi.item_name AS "Component Name:Data:240",
    bi.qty AS "Qty:Float:80",
    bi.uom AS "UOM:Data:60",
    bi.custom_electrical_unit AS "Electrical Unit:Data:110",
    bi.custom_source_electrical_bom_rev AS "Source Rev:Data:80"
FROM `tabBOM Item` bi
INNER JOIN `tabBOM` b ON b.name = bi.parent
WHERE
    b.docstatus = 1
    AND b.is_active = 1
    AND IFNULL(bi.custom_balloon_numbers, '') != ''
ORDER BY
    bi.parent,
    CAST(bi.custom_balloon_numbers AS UNSIGNED)

name: FCO Assignments Pending Review
query:
SELECT
  name AS "Request:Link/InductOne Field Change Request:180",
  date_raised AS "Date Raised:Date:110",
  title AS "Title:Data:260",
  instance AS "Assigned Instance:Link/InductOne Instance:180",
  assignment_confidence AS "Confidence:Data:120",
  assignment_basis AS "Assignment Basis:Data:260",
  machine_identifier AS "Machine Identifier:Data:180"
FROM `tabInductOne Field Change Request`
WHERE IFNULL(assignment_reviewed, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(assignment_confidence, '') IN ('Low', 'Backfill-guess')
ORDER BY date_raised DESC, name DESC

name: SUP-FCO-R01 Field Change Register
query:
SELECT
  r.name AS "FCO #:Link/InductOne Field Change Request:150",
  r.date_raised AS "Date Raised:Date:110",
  r.requester AS "Requester:Data:160",
  r.intake_ref AS "Intake Ref (Submission ID / Link):Data:180",
  r.customer_project AS "Customer / Project:Data:180",
  COALESCE(r.instance, r.machine_identifier) AS "IND-#### Serial(s) / Location(s):Data:220",
  r.title AS "Change Summary:Data:260",
  r.triage_outcome AS "Triage Outcome:Data:130",
  r.reference AS "Reference (ECR / Epic / Ticket):Data:220",
  IF(r.safety_regulatory, 'Y', 'N') AS "Safety / Regulatory (Y/N):Data:120",
  r.disposition AS "Disposition:Data:120",
  r.disposition_date AS "Disposition Date:Date:120",
  MAX(fc.implemented_date) AS "Implemented Date:Date:120",
  IF(MAX(IFNULL(fc.as_maintained_updated,0)) = 1, 'Y', 'N') AS "As-Maintained Updated in ERPNext:Data:160",
  MAX(fc.post_change_test) AS "Post-Change Test:Data:130",
  r.status AS "Status:Data:120",
  IF(r.status='Closed', r.modified, NULL) AS "Closed Date:Datetime:150",
  r.notes AS "Notes:Data:280"
FROM `tabInductOne Field Change Request` r
LEFT JOIN `tabInductOne Field Change` fc ON fc.source_request = r.name
GROUP BY r.name
ORDER BY r.date_raised, r.name

name: Configured Snapshot Diff
report_script:
out = frappe.call(
    "inductone_tools.snapshot_diff.loader.get_report_data",
    snapshot_a=filters.get("snapshot_a"),
    snapshot_b=filters.get("snapshot_b"),
    view_mode=filters.get("view_mode") or "Hierarchical",
    context_mode=filters.get("context_mode") or "Changes only",
)
data = [
    out["columns"],
    out["data"],
    out["message"],
    None,
    out["report_summary"],
    1,
]

name: Delivery Note by PO
json: {"filters":[],"fields":[["customer","Delivery Note"],["po_no","Delivery Note"],["name","Delivery Note"],["status","Delivery Note"],["grand_total","Delivery Note"],["currency","Delivery Note"],["po_date","Delivery Note"],["custom_delivery_date","Delivery Note"],["custom_carrier","Delivery Note"]],"order_by":"`tabDelivery Note`.`modified` desc","add_totals_row":0,"page_length":20,"column_widths":{"customer":120,"po_no":100,"name":120,"status":150,"grand_total":150,"currency":120,"po_date":100,"custom_delivery_date":120,"custom_carrier":120},"group_by":null}
